name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Geelong
course_summary: A fast Australian half at Eastern Beach with a bay swim, rolling waterfront bike, and rolling run along the Geelong foreshore.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Oceanside
course_summary: Oceanside's iconic half pairs a protected harbor swim with a hilly Camp Pendleton bike and a rolling Strand-side run.

name: 2025 Challenge Sir Bani Yas
course_summary: Hot island half in Abu Dhabi waters with a fast open-water swim and generally flat bike and run terrain.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Brasilia
course_summary: Brasilia's half uses the calm waters of Lake Paranoa, a predominantly flat bike through the capital, and a flat run in the park.

name: 2025 Challenge Mogan Gran Canaria
course_summary: Warm Canary Islands half with an ocean swim, rolling coastal bike terrain, and a sun-exposed run around Mogan.

name: 2025 Challenge Taiwan Half
course_summary: Humid spring half in Taitung with a warm-water swim, fast bike sections, and a flat coastal run.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Peru
course_summary: Peru's half-distance race features a calm Pacific swim at Agua Dulce, a very flat beach-road bike, and a flat waterfront run.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Valencia
course_summary: Mediterranean half with an ocean swim at Malvarrosa, a mostly fast bike with a few elevated sections inland, and a flat park-side run.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Jesolo
course_summary: Flat Adriatic half with a sea swim, low-lying Venetian bike terrain, and a long flat run along the coast and promenade.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 St. George
course_summary: Classic desert half with a reservoir swim, punchy red-rock climbing on the bike, and a warm rolling run.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Port Macquarie
course_summary: Coastal Australian half with a calm river swim, rolling scenic bike terrain, and a flatter run along the waterfront and breakwall.

name: 2025 Challenge Salou
course_summary: Fast Mediterranean half built around a sea swim, flat bike roads, and a flat promenade run in Salou.

name: 2025 Challenge Cesenatico
course_summary: Italian Riviera half with a sea swim, inland rolling bike terrain, and a flatter seafront run back in Cesenatico.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Chattanooga
course_summary: Downriver swim in the Tennessee River, a rolling rural bike, and a rolling riverwalk-style run through Chattanooga.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Aix-en-Provence
course_summary: Lake swim near Aix, a demanding hilly Provençal bike, and a rolling urban run through the city center.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Kraichgau
course_summary: The 'land of 1,000 hills' half with a clear-water lake swim, hilly rural bike course, and a rolling run through Bad Schonborn.

name: 2025 Challenge Samorin
course_summary: Fast central European half centered around the x-bionic sphere, with a flat swim venue, flat bike, and flat run.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Shanghai
course_summary: Shanghai's half features a lake swim, fast flat out-and-back roads, and a flat run course around the water.

name: 2025 Challenge St Polten
course_summary: Central European half with a cool lake swim, rolling Austrian bike terrain, and a steady rolling run into town.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Loire Valley
course_summary: Loire Valley half with a river swim near Tours, a gently rolling bike, and a flatter run through the city and river corridor.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Warsaw
course_summary: Urban half with a calm lake swim, flat roads through Warsaw landmarks, and a flat city-center run to Multimedia Fountain Park.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Eagleman
course_summary: A classic windy flat half on the Eastern Shore with a tidal river swim, flat bike, and flat run on exposed roads.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Pennsylvania
course_summary: A cooler northeastern half with a lake swim, rolling roads, and a rolling campus-based run.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Boulder
course_summary: Altitude half with a reservoir swim, hilly Front Range bike terrain, and a hard-packed rolling run around Boulder Reservoir.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Les Sables d'Olonne-Vendee
course_summary: Atlantic coast half with an ocean swim, a mostly flat coastal bike, and a rolling harbor-side run.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Westfriesland
course_summary: Dutch half with a harbor/lake swim, famously flat bike terrain through open countryside, and a flat city run in Hoorn.

name: 2025 Challenge Gdansk
course_summary: Baltic half with a cool-water swim, generally flat bike roads, and a flat urban run through Gdansk.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Nice
course_summary: Hot Riviera half with a sea swim, a decisive hilly bike inland above Nice, and a flat Promenade des Anglais run.

name: 2025 Challenge Walchsee
course_summary: Scenic alpine half with a clean lake swim, rolling Austrian bike terrain, and a rolling run beneath the mountains.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Sweden
course_summary: Cool Scandinavian half with a lake swim, rolling countryside bike, and a rolling run through Jonkoping.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Swansea
course_summary: A scenic Welsh half with a sea swim, a notably hilly bike toward Mumbles, and a flatter run through the marina and city.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Ecuador
course_summary: Warm Pacific half in Manta with an ocean swim, rolling urban/coastal bike terrain, and a flat run along the waterfront.

name: 2025 Challenge Turku
course_summary: A cool Nordic half in Turku with a calm swim venue, generally flat roads, and a flat run.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Krakow
course_summary: A scenic Polish half with a quarry-lake swim, gently rolling roads south of Krakow, and a flat city run to Market Square.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Rio De Janeiro
course_summary: Rio's half offers an ocean swim off Copacabana, a flat coastal bike, and a flat three-loop run around Flamengo.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Lapu-Lapu
course_summary: A hot tropical half with warm ocean water, a mostly flat bike, and a humid run that steadily wears athletes down.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Hradec Kralove
course_summary: A river swim in Hradec Kralove followed by rolling countryside bike terrain and a flat city run through parks and old streets.

name: 2025 IRONMAN 70.3 Louisville
course_summary: A hot Kentucky half with a downstream Ohio River swim, a rolling Oldham County bike, and a rolling downtown run.

name: 2025 Challenge Gunsan
course_summary: Summer half in Gunsan with warm conditions, a likely calm swim venue, and generally fast bike and run terrain.
